SwitchPreference.android:title: Developer Mode Enabled
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Disable to hide developer settings. Re-enable by clicking version number 10 times in About screen.

PreferenceCategory.android:title: Range Estimation Sampling
PreferenceCategory.android:summary: Minimum sampling requirements for initial baseline

com.a42r.eucosmandplugin.ui.SamplingTime.android:title: Minimum Time
com.a42r.eucosmandplugin.ui.SamplingTime.android:summary: Minimum time requirement for initial range estimate

com.a42r.eucosmandplugin.ui.SamplingDist.android:title: Minimum Distance
com.a42r.eucosmandplugin.ui.SamplingDist.android:summary: Minimum distance requirement for initial range estimate

Preference.android:summary: Changes take effect immediately. If on an active trip, the estimation will update based on new thresholds.

SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Logging
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Captures all battery samples and range estimates for post-trip analysis. A new log file is created when you reset the trip.

Preference.android:title: Trip Logs
Preference.android:summary: View and manage captured trip logs
